description: CompositionNavy blue trousers made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the sides with a patch pocket on the right hip, two pockets on the back with stitch detailing, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the frontFittingSlimWash careMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm ironCrafted from soft cotton and designed with cuts that offer a flattering silhouette, this slim Fit chino from highlander makes for a great addition to your semi-formal wardrobe. Pair it with semi-formal shirts, throw over a blazer and slip into suede shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 41.5"Height: 6'1", Waist: 31"
